iosUsageDescriptions.NSCameraUsageDescription: MoveBeta uses the camera to analyze climbing attempts on-device when you choose to record.
iosUsageDescriptions.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MoveBeta can import a climbing video you select for on-device movement analysis.

listing.fullDescription: MoveBeta helps indoor boulderers run one private movement experiment for the next attempt. Record or import a short clip, process it on the device, review one pose-based focus at the relevant video moment, then film the same climb again and compare compatible movement signals. The app measures low-movement time, elbow-flexion time, lateral torso offset, and rapid ankle movement without claiming to detect wall contact or a single correct beta. Raw video is not uploaded or stored in report history.
listing.promotionalText: Review one local pose-based focus, film the same climb again, and compare what changed.
listing.shortDescription: Private climbing movement review for your next attempt.
listing.subtitle: Private movement review

screenshots.label: Local video import and capture guidance
